Motion To Compel Further Responses To Pltfs Inspection Demand And For Sanctions Against Deft And His Atty
Off Calendar Feb-28-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Sarge R. Holtzman for plaintiff and moving party Hillay Turner

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses to inspection demand is granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Defendant is ordered to serve a response that complies with CCP 2031.210 within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $665 are to be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
